concerns.text: FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, FR-005, FR-006, FR-007, FR-008, FR-009, FR-010 all reference "US-1", "US-2", or "US-3" (e.g., “See US-1”), but no User Story IDs with those labels are defined in the document. The only identifiers for user stories are the textual headings “User Story 1”, “User Story 2”, and “User Story 3”. This creates unresolved cross‑references and inconsistent terminology between “User Story” and “US”.

The specification uses two different terms for the same concept: “User Story 1” (section heading) and “US-1” (referenced in functional requirements). This terminology shift is not declared, leading to ambiguity about whether they refer to the same artifact. Align the naming (e.g., define US-1 as the identifier for User Story 1) or update all references to a single consistent label.
